sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69870" key="nausi/bios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ναυσί-βῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n69870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living by the sea,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.12</biblScope> </bibl> (pr.n.).</sense> </entryFree>
